name: Double-or-Nothing Devil
text:
Whenever Double-or-Nothing Devil attacks, flip a coin. If you win the flip, it gets +2/+2 until end of turn. If you lose the flip, it gets -1/-1 until end of turn and you grumble.
You may flip again as many times as you dare. Each flip doubles the bonus or the penalty. Greed is a verb here.
flavorText: "One more flip. I can feel it. This one's mine." — last words, several times
